sprint.goal: Reduce false-positive governance denials blocking swarm agents: #1202 (KE-2 AAB normalization — strip rtk/time/timeout prefixes) → #1208 (heredoc false positive — PR #1238 needs rebase) → #1139 ($(date) command scanner allowlist). [#1209 closed via #1243.]

senior.title: $(date) scanner safe-subshell allowlist (#1139)
senior.note: #1202 was already closed via PR #1252 (merged). #1139 implemented: stripSafeSubshells() added to command-scanner.ts with ReDoS-safe patterns ([^)(]* instead of (?:\s+[^)(]*)?\s*). PR #1274 supersedes #1255 which had CodeQL polynomial-ReDoS concern. 20 new tests. Awaiting CI.

copilot-cli.title: Rebase PR #1238 — strip heredoc body before governance path scan
copilot-cli.note: PR #1238 CI 6/6 green. Core fix correct. BLOCKER (run 2): branch BEHIND main after #1243, #1241, #1245 merged. No merge conflicts expected. Must rebase on current main HEAD. ESCALATED to director at 23:30Z cycle per 2-run rule.

blockers.description: PR #1238 branch BEHIND main for 2 consecutive EM runs. copilot-cli not actioned.

prs.title: fix(invariants): strip heredoc body before governance path scan
prs.note: Core fix: stripHeredocBody() isolates command header before invariant scan. 9 tests (5 unit + 4 integration). BLOCKER (run 2): branch BEHIND main. Escalated to director. Rebase clean — no conflicts with #1243/#1241/#1245.

prs.title: fix(matchers): safe-subshell allowlist — prevent $(date) false positives
prs.note: Supersedes #1255 (same logic, ReDoS-safe patterns). 20 new tests. Awaiting CI. Closes #1139.
